items.sentence: A primary development focus is correctly resolving complex type hints, especially those involving `Annotated`, `ForwardRef`, and postponed annotations (`from __future__ import annotations`) (Issues #15364, #15307, #15234).
Work is underway on long-standing feature requests, such as adding authentication to static file serving (`AuthStaticFiles`, #15295) and exploring class-based views (#15392).
Recent fixes have addressed performance regressions like memory usage in the `Dependant` class (#15336) and stability problems like deadlocks during dependency injection teardown (#15388).
